questions.query_text: Across the surrealdb/surrealdb releases, how does the release type of v3.0.0-alpha.8 differ from that of v3.0.0?

options.text: v3.0.0-alpha.8 is an alpha pre-release, while v3.0.0 is a stable release.
v3.0.0-alpha.8 is a beta pre-release, while v3.0.0 is an alpha pre-release.

questions.expected_answer: v3.0.0-alpha.8 is an alpha pre-release, while v3.0.0 is a stable release.

answer_support.answer_text: In the surrealdb/surrealdb release v3.0.0-alpha.8, the project publishes an alpha pre-release with tag v3.0.0-alpha.8 on 2025-09-16.
In the surrealdb/surrealdb release v3.0.0, the project publishes a stable release with tag v3.0.0 on 2026-02-17.

questions.query_text: In the surrealdb/surrealdb release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a stable release with tag v2.4.0, (2) an alpha pre-release with tag v3.0.0-alpha.16, (3) a beta pre-release with tag v3.0.0-beta.1.

answer_support.answer_text: In the surrealdb/surrealdb release v2.4.0, the project publishes a stable release with tag v2.4.0 on 2025-11-24.
In the surrealdb/surrealdb release v3.0.0-alpha.16, the project publishes an alpha pre-release with tag v3.0.0-alpha.16 on 2025-11-24.
In the surrealdb/surrealdb release v3.0.0-beta.1, the project publishes a beta pre-release with tag v3.0.0-beta.1 on 2025-12-17.
